## Quality gates
- [ ] `npm run lint` — passes with 0 errors
- [ ] `npm run build` — clean production build
- [ ] `USE_AI=false npm run eval` — all deterministic answer evals pass
- [ ] `npm run eval:retrieval` — all retrieval evals pass (if available)


## Safety checks
- [ ] `.env.local` not committed
- [ ] No API keys or secrets committed
- [ ] No real personal data added
- [ ] Safety rules not weakened
- [ ] Access-control rules not weakened
- [ ] Eval expectations not weakened without explicit explanation
- [ ] No unnecessary dependencies added
- [ ] `USE_AI=true` eval not run repeatedly
